display_name: WIDEEXIT A/B v2 (2026-07-03 winner exit decode, re-armed — v1 tp1+13/30%/stop-12 was trending BEHIND control 17/30 tokens, n resets): grid-optimal ladder from 198 configs replayed on regime-winner episodes — TP1 +13 (sell 50%) / TP2 +30 / trail 2pp / FLOOR -18. Worth +2.0-2.5pp/trade on that cohort; floor -12 -> -18 alone ~+1.2pp (our -12 fires on 36% of winner episodes and kills 24% of eventual greens; their entries wick p25 -12.4 then run). CAVEAT: -18 validated on winner-selected entries only — never-green cuts (velocity bail, MAE floor, ng_faststop) stay ON in this arm so duds still cut early; the floor only widens for legs that survive the in-flight stack. Judge vs badday_flush at n>=30 distinct tokens scrubbed. Decode also REFUTED breakeven-arm at +4 (win% collapses 23-29%) and validated our re-entry cooldowns (their <10%-discount rebuys realize median -6.6).
